title: Kafka Reader
description: Enterprise only. Defines how to read messages from a Kafka cluster

connection.title: Connection details
connection.description: settings to stablish the connection to the kafka services

consumer.title: Consumer options
consumer.description: details about how to read from the topic

topics.title: Topics
topics.description: the list of topics to read from

group_id.title: Consumer Group ID
group_id.description: the name of the consumer group to use

key_meta.title: Key Meta Name
key_meta.description: the name of the header where the kafka message key value is written
